data.name: Qiuhua

weaponImprint.name: Trailblazer
weaponImprint.trait: Before using an active skill, cleanses 1 debuff on this unit. If the cleansing is successful, gains 1 random attack buff for 1 turn.
weaponImprint.effect: Burn damage dealt is increased by 10%/11%/12%/13%/14%/15%. Each time Burn damage is dealt, Burn damage dealt is further increased by 2%/3%/4%/5%/6%/7%, to a maximum increase of 10%/15%/20%/25%/30%/35%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to Sycca Technologies units is increased by 2.5%. if the target has a Burn debuff, damage is additionally increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A passionate, high-energy Doll with an optimistic outlook on life. As a gourmet hunter in the Yellow Zones, she's made it her mission to develop new ingredients to tackle food shortages. Standing against injustice is a way of life for her and her credo is to never let a conversation trail off. "While I can't say I approve of adding ketchup to Guo Bao Rou, if that's how you like it, then I suppose I can live with it."

skills.name: Trailblaze
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Zao Jun's Rule
skills.description:
Qiuhua's Burn damage dealt is increased by 5% when there are no other allied Dolls within 2 tiles of Qiuhua.

If [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] is applied to an enemy within attack range, Qiuhua launches one instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing Burn damage equal to 60% of attack, 1 point of stability damage, and gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. This effect can be triggered once per turn.

Critical rate is increased by 30% when dealing Burn damage to targets with [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Qiuhua's Burn damage dealt is increased by 15%. When dealing damage, if critical rate of this attack exceeds 100%, every 1% of overflow critical rate is converted to 1% critical damage.

If [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] is applied to an enemy within attack range, Qiuhua launches one instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing Burn damage equal to 60% of attack, 1 point of stability damage, and gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. This effect can be triggered twice per turn.

Critical rate is increased by 30% when dealing Burn damage to targets with [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7].
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Qiuhua's Burn damage dealt is increased by 15%. When dealing damage, if critical rate of this attack exceeds 100%, every 1% of overflow critical rate is converted to 1% critical damage.

If [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] is applied to an enemy within attack range, Qiuhua launches one instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing Burn damage equal to 60% of attack, 1 point of stability damage, and gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. This effect can be triggered twice per turn.

Critical rate is increased by 30% when dealing Burn damage to targets with [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7]. If the target holds more than 10 stacks of [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7], for each excess stack, Qiuhua's attack is increased by 1%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Instances of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd] is increased by 1. Qiuhua's Burn damage dealt is increased to 15%. The limit of not having other allied Dolls around Qiuhua is no longer needed.

When dealing damage, if critical rate of this attack exceeds 100%, every 1% of overflow critical rate is converted to 1% critical damage.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
[effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] no longer has a stack limit.

A new effect is added when dealing Burn damage to enemy targets with [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7]: If the target holds more than 10 stacks of [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7], for each excess stack, Qiuhua's attack is increased by 1%.

skills.name: Searing Sizzle
skills.description:
Selects 1 enemy target with 6 tiles, dealing Burn damage equal to 120% of attack to it.

If the distance to the target is less than or equal to 4 tiles, damage dealt is increased by 5%, and stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 enemy target with 6 tiles, dealing Burn damage equal to 120% of attack to it. After the attack, Qiuhua gains Extra Movement buff that allows an extra movement for 6 tiles. If the target holds [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7], damage dealt to the target is increased by 30%.

If the distance to the target is less than or equal to 4 tiles, damage dealt is increased by 15%, and stability damage dealt is increased by 2 points.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Qiuhua gains Extra Movement buff that allows an extra movement for 6 tiles after attacking.

If the target holds [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7], damage dealt to the target is increased by 30%. If the distance to the target is less than or equal to 4 tiles, damage dealt to the target is increased by 15% and stability damage dealt to the target is increased by 2 points.

skills.name: Soaring Leap
skills.description: Selects 1 tile within 6 tiles, leaps to it, and deals Burn damage equivalent to 30% of attack to the nearest enemy target within 6 tiles. After the attack, Qiuhua gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. The cooldown of the Ultimate Skill Boil and Reduce is reduced by 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 tile within 6 tiles, leaps to it, and deals Burn damage equivalent to 80% of attack to the nearest enemy target within 6 tiles. After the attack, Qiuhua gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. In addition, Qiuhua gains [effect:74708574-8ab6-4216-a8d2-e28494703a9f] and [effect:4bb0f99c-7615-40a5-838a-ceff0e4b57a2] for 1 turn. The cooldown of the Ultimate Skill Boil and Reduce is reduced by 1 turn. If the target holds [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7], deals 1 additional instance of fixed damage equal to 50% of attack to it.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier is increased by 50%. if the target holds [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7], deals 1 additional instance of fixed damage equal to 50% of attack to it. After the attack, Qiuhua gains [effect:74708574-8ab6-4216-a8d2-e28494703a9f] and [effect:4bb0f99c-7615-40a5-838a-ceff0e4b57a2] for 1 turn.

skills.name: Boil and Reduce
skills.description: Selects 1 tile within 6 tiles, deals AoE Burn damage equal to 90% of attack, and applies [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the selected tile for 3 turns. Expends all points of Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index expended, the damage multiplier of this attack is increased by 5%.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 tile within 6 tiles, deals AoE Burn damage equal to 90% of attack, applies [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the selected tile for 3 turns, and triggers the end-of-turn effect of [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] once. Expends all points of Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index expended, the damage multiplier of this attack is increased by 5%.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 tile within 6 tiles, deals AoE Burn damage equal to 90% of attack, applies [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the selected tile for 3 turns, and triggers the end-of-turn effect of [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] once. Expends all points of Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index expended, the damage multiplier of this attack is increased by 5%. If only one target is hit, damage dealt is increased by 15%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Cooldown is reduced by 1 turn. When dealing damage, triggers the end-of-turn effect of [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] once.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
If only one target is hit, damage dealt is increased by 15%.

The effect of [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] is changed: Damage dealt is increased, equal to 10% of the inflictor's attack. When the target with this debuff takes Burn damage, it gains 2 stacks instead.

keys.effect: When [effect:93f91944-fc00-410d-995a-74155802def7] deals Burn damage, the damage dealt is increased by 10%.

[effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd] damage multiplier is increased by 30% and when dealing damage, ignores 15% of target's defense; for each [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd] performed, gain 1 stack of [effect:c52dd4f3-f7c2-4094-8689-0ad9704c8b09] for 2 rounds.

When a unit with [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] dies, deals AoE Burn damage equal to 130% of Qiuhua's attack to all allied units within a radius of 3 tiles.

When the active skill Soaring Leap deals damage, creates [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] Tiles within a radius of 1 tile around the target, lasting for 2 turns.
At the start of the battle, gain 3 points of Confectance Index.
At the start of the turn, Qiuhua applies [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] to the enemy target with the highest HP for 3 turns. This effect has a cooldown of 2 turns.
Immune to the negative effects of Burn tiles and all Burn debuffs. At the end of action, if Qiuhua is on a Burn tile, recovers HP equal to 10% of max HP and 2 points of stability.
Before launching an active attack, Qiuhua applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to the target for 1 turn.
Before performing [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], Qiuhua cleanses 1 buff from the target.

vertebrae.effect: Cooldown is reduced by 1 turn. When dealing damage, triggers the end-of-turn effect of [effect:119105e8-f821-47a0-a1ce-b6169bb261b7] once.

doll.name: Qiuhua
doll.effects: A passionate, high-energy Doll with an optimistic outlook on life. As a gourmet hunter in the Yellow Zones, she's made it her mission to develop new ingredients to tackle food shortages. Standing against injustice is a way of life for her and her credo is to never let a conversation trail off. "While I can't say I approve of adding ketchup to Guo Bao Rou, if that's how you like it, then I suppose I can live with it."

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Burn debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets with 50% or lower HP is increased by 10%.
After inflicting a critical hit, deals 3 points of fixed stability damage to the enemy target. This effect can trigger up to 2 times per turn.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

At the end of the action, the inflictor deals Burn damage equal to 7% of attack to the debuff holder. Each additional stack increases the damage multiplier by 7%, after which all stacks are cleared. Gains 1 stack when taking Burn damage from an enemy, to a maximum of 12 stacks. Remove all stacks when the inflictor dies. Considered a Burn debuff, cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"63ccea5d-109b-4d2b-acb6-13724cb2d2a6","upgradeName":"V3","upgradeDetails":"

At the end of the action, the inflictor deals Burn damage equal to 7% of attack to the debuff holder. Each additional stack increases the damage multiplier by 7%, after which all stacks are cleared. Gains 1 stack when taking Burn damage from an enemy. Remove all stacks when the inflictor dies. Considered a Burn debuff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":0},{"id":"e3605a10-31e6-405a-980f-27cd48e782cd","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

At the end of the action, the inflictor deals Burn damage equal to 10% of attack to the debuff holder. Each additional stack increases the damage multiplier by 10%, after which all stacks are cleared. Gains 2 stacks when taking Burn damage from an enemy. Remove all stacks when the inflictor dies. Considered a Burn debuff, cannot be cleansed.

","order":1}]}
Burn damage dealt increased by 7%, damage taken reduced by 7%, stacks up to 4 times. Considered a Burn buff, cannot be cleansed.
